title: CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled E-commerce Executive looking for your next big career move? CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CarDekho Consulting Pvt Ltd!
